raw_consumer_statement: There is a fraudulent set of transactions occurring on my BestBuy Citi card in the beginning of the year XXXX. I have not made any transactions on this card whatsoever since XXXX, and I have paid that balance in full for the purchase made in XXXX. When looking on their website to dispute the transactions, there is no mention of what the transactions are for or what date they occurred on. Additionally, when looking at the statements for this card, each time I open it from the website, it says a different amount each time for the balance ( around {$400.00} on one statement, and {$170.00} on the other ). There is also no way to dispute these transactions on the website as the transactions aren't listed when selecting the " Dispute a Charge '' option. These transactions appear to be entirely fraudulent/fabricated, and they are beginning to impact my credit score significantly. There is also no apparent option to cancel the card either on the website, and the customer service number repeatedly calls my phone number throughout the day, often with conflicting and entirely inaccurate information each time.
